executive: Real Estate Attorney — 15+ years FL transaction/litigation

round1_findings_delta.translation_vs_advice: IMPROVED (attorney gate changes the legal structure)

new_critical_findings: CRITICAL: Documentary contradiction — TranslationViewer.tsx + 5 planning docs say attorney is 'optional' while code enforces mandatory
CRITICAL: No attorney retained — boolean gate with no gatekeeper
HIGH: Synthetic comps presented as real market data — UDAP risk
HIGH: No consumer acknowledgment mechanism for AI disclosure
MEDIUM: Translation prompt header says 'directly replaces the agent' — plaintiff gift
MEDIUM: Pre-cached translations contain advisory language
MEDIUM: FL 475 brokerage boundary not analyzed
key_insight: Making attorney review mandatory transforms the legal positioning from 'AI replacing licensed activity' (indefensible) to 'AI operating under attorney supervision' (defensible). But the team shipped the code change without updating docs, UI, or actually retaining an attorney. The result is an architecturally sound system that would fail its own compliance check.
